text: A recipe for 4 people uses 300 grams of flour. Tom wants to make the same recipe for 6 people. How many grams of flour does he need?
generatorSolution:
Step 1: Find how much flour is needed per person. 300 g ÷ 4 = 75 g per person.
Step 2: Multiply by the number of people Tom is cooking for. 75 g × 6 = 450 g.
So Tom needs 450 grams of flour.
